name: Onion Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the onion soup mix and sour cream, mixing well.
2. Add the cheddar cheese and parmesan cheese, mixing thoroughly.
3. Spread the cheese mixture evenly over four of the tortillas.
4. Place the remaining tortillas on top, creating four layered stacks.
5. Brush the tops of each stack with corn oil.
6. Broil until puffy and lightly browned.
7. Turn the stacks and brush with additional oil.
8. Continue broiling until lightly browned on the other side.
9. Remove from heat and let rest for 2-3 minutes.
10. Cut into wedges and serve warm.
